# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account for application logs and backups"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the storage account"
      }
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "application-logs",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the blob container for application logs"
      }
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "backups",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the blob container for backups"
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Standard_ZRS"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SKU for the storage account (Standard performance tier)"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": true,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "bypass": "AzureServices"
        }
      },
      "tags": {
        "purpose": "logging-infrastructure",
        "environment": "production"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 30
        },
        "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 30
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', parameters('logsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "application-logs"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', parameters('backupsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "backups"
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    },
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
    },
    "primaryBlobEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('storageAccountId'), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('logsContainerName')]"
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('backupsContainerName')]"
    }
  }
}
